name: NyxQueen 4Wave Diode Laser (Champagne Gold)
shortDescription: The NyxQueen diode laser in champagne gold finish. 600W power, 4 wavelengths, 50 million shot lifespan. The same cutting-edge technology with a luxurious gold appearance.
description: The NyxQueen diode laser champagne gold edition – the same professional-grade 600W power and 4-wavelength system in a champagne gold finish. A perfect choice for those looking for a device that matches a luxurious, elegant salon ambiance.
metaTitle: NyxQueen Diode Laser Champagne Gold | 600W, 4 wavelengths, 50M shots
metaDescription: NyxQueen 600W diode laser in champagne gold finish. 4 wavelengths (755, 808, 940, 1064 nm), 50M shots, advanced cooling. 2-year warranty, free training.
